---
title: "Colter_Bay_Red_White"
author: "Nigel K. Anderson"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Quarto

Quarto enables you to weave together content and executable code into a finished document. To learn more about Quarto see <https://quarto.org>.

## Colter Bay Red and White Light Experiment

First I had to create a shortcut on the shared folder in google drive to be on mydrive. I then found that shared folder on mydrive in finder and copied the location url.

```{r, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE}
source("01_import_sonobat.R")
```

```{r}
source("02_clean_data.R")
data <- clean_data(data_raw)
```

```{r}
source("03_extract_habitat.R")

#data_env <- add_environmental_covariates(data, forest_raster)

data_env <- add_habitat(
  data,
  forest_raster = nlcd_forest,
  buffer = 500
)

data_env <- add_moonlight(data_env)
```

```{r}
source("04_Occurrence_Thresholds.R")

occurrences <- run_thresholds(data_env, thresholds = c(30, 60, 120, 300))

glimpse(occurrences)

occurrences %>%
  ggplot(aes(threshold_sec, occurrences, group = site, color = site)) + 
  geom_line(alpha = 0.3)

occurrences %>%
  group_by(threshold_sec) %>%
  summarise(total_occurrences = sum(occurrences))

data_30 <- occurrences %>%
  filter(threshold_sec == 30)

data_60 <- occurrences %>%
  filter(threshold_sec == 60)

data_120 <- occurrences %>%
  filter(threshold_sec == 120)

data_300 <- occurrences %>%
  filter(threshold_sec == 300)

site_env <- data_env %>%
  distinct(site, pct_forest)

occurrences <- occurrences %>%
  left_join(site_env, by = "site")
```

```{r}

data_env %>%
  count(site, species) %>%
  arrange(desc(n)) %>%
  head()

data_env %>%
  summarise(
    min_time = min(time_sec),
    max_time = max(time_sec),
    n_unique_times = n_distinct(time_sec)
  )

data_env %>%
  arrange(site, species, time_sec) %>%
  group_by(site, species) %>%
  summarise(
    min_gap = min(diff(time_sec), na.rm = TRUE),
    max_gap = max(diff(time_sec), na.rm = TRUE)
  )
```

```{r}
source("05_data_exploration.R")
```

```{r}
source("06_run_models.R")
models <- run_models(data_env)

AIC(m0,m1,m2)

anova(m0,m1)
anova(m1,m2)

sim <- simulateResiduals(m2)

plot(sim)

testDispersion(sim)

testZeroInflation(sim)
```

```{r}

library(glmmTMB)

m_30 <- glmmTMB(
  occurrences ~ 1 + (1|site),
  data = filter(occurrences, threshold_sec == 30),
  family = nbinom2()
)

m_60 <- glmmTMB(
  occurrences ~ 1 + (1|site),
  data = filter(occurrences, threshold_sec == 60),
  family = nbinom2()
)

m_120 <- glmmTMB(
  occurrences ~ 1 + (1|site),
  data = filter(occurrences, threshold_sec == 120),
  family = nbinom2()
)

m_300 <- glmmTMB(
  occurrences ~ 1 + (1|site),
  data = filter(occurrences, threshold_sec == 300),
  family = nbinom2()
)

AIC(m_30, m_60, m_120, m_300)

bind_rows(
  broom.mixed::tidy(m_30) %>% mutate(threshold = 30),
  broom.mixed::tidy(m_60) %>% mutate(threshold = 60),
  broom.mixed::tidy(m_120) %>% mutate(threshold = 120),
  broom.mixed::tidy(m_300) %>% mutate(threshold = 300)
) 
  
  
```

At the end of every day:

git add .

git commit -m "updated detection pipeline"

git push
